offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 premium audits/month, manual submission causes delays in claims processing. We simplify submissions instead of manual submission via email or paper forms.
problem: Manual submission of insurance premium audits is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Indie Hackers posts on premium audit workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Community forums where brokers share tools
try_it: Let users try template for premium audit submissions on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
